rows.title: Adjuvant Radiotherapy for Invasive Breast Cancer
rows.source_owner: Alberta Health Services / Cancer Care Alberta / GURU
rows.notes: Bounded public AHS/GURU prototype selector row for downloader, manifest, parser, source-span, and graph-ready smoke tests. Public URL use is limited to local raw downloads under ignored resources/raw/ahs-guru-public/, manifests/checksums, bounded draft source spans, and draft graph-ready prototype records. No PDF, page body, guideline text, excerpt, recommendation, summary, embedding, approved clinical recommendation, PHI, dosing advice, diagnostic conclusion, or patient-specific advice is stored in this registry file. Selected because it has a clear public PDF URL and stable breast guideline metadata row.
